text:
Some PentiumPro boxes hang up the keyboard.

Fix: Patch for FreeBSD 2.2-961014-SNAP /sys/i386/isa/clock.c

===============================================
Patch for FreeBSD 2.1.5-RELEASE /sys/i386/isa/clock.c

===============================================
How-To-Repeat: 
	When fast typing.
